name: codex-usage-stick
description: Automatically starts a BLE bridge that sends Codex usage to an M5Stack StickS3 display.

interface.shortDescription: Start the StickS3 Codex usage BLE bridge
interface.longDescription: Starts a local Python BLE bridge when a Codex session starts. The bridge reads local Codex usage data and sends token totals, 5h usage, and 7d usage to a StickS3 running the matching firmware.
defaultPrompt: Check my Codex Usage Stick bridge status
